---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
::: {.project-header}
::: {.container}
[← Back to Research](../research.qmd){.back-link}
# Conflicts in Northern South America by Köppen-Geiger Climate Classification
::: {.project-meta}
<span><strong>Course:</strong> GIS & Spatial Data Analysis</span>
<span><strong>Term:</strong> Fall 2025</span>
<span><strong>Tools:</strong> QGIS · UCDP/PRIO v25 · Beck et al. 2018</span>
:::
:::
:::
::: {.container style="max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding-bottom: 5rem;"}

## Overview

Spatial overlay of UCDP/PRIO conflict event data (2024) with Beck et al. 2018 Köppen-Geiger climate classification zones across Northern South America, including Central America, Colombia, Venezuela, and surrounding regions.

::: {.project-visual}
*[Add your conflict/climate map image here]*
::: {.visual-caption}
Conflicts in Northern South America by Köppen-Geiger Climate Classification. Blue dots = UCDP/PRIO conflict events. Background = climate zones per Beck et al. 2018. Source: UCDP/PRIO v25 (2024), GADM v4.1.
:::
:::

:::
